name: Controlled Live Readiness

src/gates/checks.py — registered check_mon_phase13, check_backup_phase13, check_learn_promo_l, check_sec, check_deploy, check_config_freeze, check_live in CHECKS registry
configs/gates.yaml — Phase 13 gate specs: LEARN-PROMO-L, SEC, DEPLOY, BACKUP (Phase 13 full), MON (Phase 13 full), CONFIG-FREEZE, LIVE with pass conditions + remediation
reports/phase_13/operator_signoff.json — operator sign-off document (acknowledged=true, mode=PAPER/TESTNET, risk envelope documented)
docs/decisions/phase13_rollback_plan.md — version rollback, learner rollback, database rollback, emergency close procedures; MVP deployment decisions
tests/test_phase13_live.py — 68 tests: TestLearnPromoL(8), TestSec(8), TestDeploy(7), TestBackup(7), TestMon(5), TestConfigFreeze(9), TestLive(9), TestPhase13GateIntegration(15)
tests/test_gates.py — updated test_blocked_gate_creates_remediation_actions to reflect LIVE now PASS in Phase 13

deploy_gate.evidence: DEPLOY gate PASS (6/6): compose_file_present, compose_syntax_valid, live_engine_service_defined, live_engine_isolated, health_module_present, rollback_plan_documented

backup_gate.evidence: BACKUP gate PASS (6/6 Phase 13 full version): backup_path_configured, backup_script_present, backup_script_syntax_valid, restore_script_present, restore_script_syntax_valid, backup_metadata_version_set

mon_gate.evidence: MON gate PASS (17/17 Phase 13 full version): alert_sink_singleton, alert_severity_enum, critical_alert_emittable, warning_alert_emittable, alert_ring_buffer, all 24 Appendix B.14 alert types covered (verified via consolidated criterion)

config_freeze_gate.evidence: CONFIG-FREEZE gate PASS (8/8): config_version, universe_version, data_version, metadata_version, strategy_version, feature_set_version, risk_policy_version, execution_policy_version all non-empty; settings.versions() returns ≥8 entries

live_gate.evidence: LIVE gate PASS (10/10 LIVE-1 through LIVE-10): soak_framework, circuit_breakers, reconciliation, portfolio_limits, mode_not_live, paper_mode_confirmed, killswitch_operational, rollback_path_verified, alert_escalation, operator_signoff

enable_live_trading_false.evidence: settings.enable_live_trading=False by default; ENABLE_LIVE_TRADING=false in .env.example; all SEC criteria pass; mode_not_live LIVE criterion PASS

operator_signoff.evidence: reports/phase_13/operator_signoff.json present with acknowledged=true, capital_is_loseable_confirmed=true, risk_params_reviewed=true, mode=PAPER/TESTNET

rollback_plan.evidence: docs/decisions/phase13_rollback_plan.md: version rollback (git tag), learner rollback (frozen_fallback), DB rollback (alembic downgrade), emergency close (KillSwitch.engage)

no_forbidden_shortcuts.evidence: No live trading enabled; no real exchange credentials; ENABLE_LIVE_TRADING=false in .env.example; trading-engine-live isolated behind Docker 'live' profile; all gate checks verify safety

tests.coverage_gates: src/gates/phase13.py covered by TestLearnPromoL, TestSec, TestDeploy, TestBackup, TestMon, TestConfigFreeze, TestLive, TestPhase13GateIntegration

assumptions_and_decisions: docs/decisions/phase13_rollback_plan.md: LIVE gate pass = technically ready; actual Go-Live requires a second manual dashboard action. Operator sign-off (operator_signoff.json) confirms capital-is-loseable and risk params reviewed — a second approval is needed at dashboard before live.

LIVE-1 (72h soak): Gate checks that soak infrastructure (health, kill switch, monitoring) is operational and paper engine can support a soak run. An actual 72h continuous testnet/demo soak with no unhandled crashes is required before the operator clicks 'Go Live' — that run is a pre-Go-Live operational step, not an automated gate check.
MON gate: Phase 13 full version adds all 24 Appendix B.14 required alert types (verified via alert module inspection) on top of the Phase 1 skeleton. This replaces the Phase 1 MON check entirely.
BACKUP gate: Phase 13 full version verifies backup_path, backup/restore scripts present and syntax-valid (bash -n), and metadata_version configured. Phase 1 skeleton replaced.
trading-engine-live Docker isolation: docker-compose.yml uses profiles: [live] so `docker compose up` without --profile live does NOT start the live trading engine. SEC gate verifies this.
CONFIG-FREEZE uses settings.versions() which returns 9 version strings. Gate requires ≥8 non-empty, which all pass since all are cfg_0001/dv_0001/etc.
LEARN-PROMO-L depends on LEARN-PROMO-S (Phase 11) in the gate graph; topological runner ensures LEARN-PROMO-S PASS before LEARN-PROMO-L runs.
known_gaps_risks: 72h soak run: The LIVE-1 gate criterion certifies infrastructure readiness only. An operator must manually run a 72h paper/testnet soak before triggering the dashboard 'Go Live' action.

Docker live profile: The trading-engine-live service in docker-compose.yml is isolated behind the 'live' profile. If an operator runs `docker compose --profile live up`, it starts the live service — the safety guarantees rely on operator discipline for that profile flag.

Dashboard auth: SEC gate checks dashboard_auth_enabled via settings attribute; actual auth middleware enforcement depends on the FastAPI app's dependency injection being configured correctly in deployment.

Operator sign-off is static (pre-committed JSON file). A production system would require a time-limited, cryptographically signed sign-off per deployment; this MVP uses a committed JSON as a governance checkpoint.
CONFIG-FREEZE online_learner_version is included in versions() return (9 keys) but is categorized with model versioning, not config versioning. Gate passes because 9 ≥ 8 required.
tested: yes — 68/68 phase13 tests pass; SEC 7/7 PASS; DEPLOY 6/6 PASS; BACKUP 6/6 PASS; MON 17/17 PASS; CONFIG-FREEZE 8/8 PASS; LEARN-PROMO-L 6/6 PASS; LIVE 10/10 PASS; 515/515 full suite pass
next_step: Phase 14 — Production Hardening (if any) or operator Go-Live after 72h paper soak
